login.title: Sign in to Aegis
login.subtitle: Operator credentials for the control panel.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Operational overview of the Aegis panel.
dashboard.hostsDesc: Endpoints bundled as products for end users.

nodes.title: Nodes
nodes.subtitle: BYO servers running the VPN core (sing-box).
nodes.createDescription: Provide the SSH endpoint the panel will use to reach the node. The node's own registration is a separate step in the agent flow.
nodes.editDescription: Update the node's metadata. The agent will pick up the change on its next heartbeat.
nodes.name: Name

inbounds.title: Inbounds
inbounds.subtitle: Per-node protocol listeners (VLESS / Hysteria 2 / Shadowsocks / Trojan).
inbounds.name: Name

hosts.title: Hosts
hosts.subtitle: Bundles of endpoints visible to end users as products.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: End-user VPN accounts.
users.placeholderDescription: The full CRUD surface (list / create / edit / delete + per-user subscription URL) lands with the user module in v0.2. The route is wired so the nav link resolves.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.subtitle: Preview the rendered subscription payload for any sub_token.
subscription.previewDescription: Paste a sub_token to render the corresponding subscription URL. v0.1.0 ships preview only; per-user management lands in v0.2.
subscription.resultDescription: The panel's response for the requested token + format.
subscription.qrAlt: QR code for the subscription URL

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Operator-level settings.
settings.activePathDescription: The current URL prefix for the subscription endpoint. Empty = the documented /api/v1/sub/<token> path; non-empty = a rotated secret prefix that hides the subscription endpoint from URL-scraping bots.
settings.rotateDescription: Pick a fresh random sub_path. Existing subscribers on the old path will stop working immediately (or after the optional grace window).
settings.rotateRandom: Rotate to a fresh random sub_path
settings.explicitDescription: Pick a memorable sub_path yourself. Useful when the operator wants a recognizable prefix (e.g. "aegis-prod-2026").
settings.explicitHint: 4-64 characters, lowercase letters, digits, dashes only.
settings.warningDescription: Rotating the sub_path breaks every existing subscriber's URL. Subscribers must re-import the new URL on every device. The default empty sub_path (no rotation) keeps the documented /api/v1/sub/<token> path.
settings.confirmReset: Reset to the default empty sub_path? Existing subscribers on the rotated path will stop working.
settings.loadFailed: Could not load the active sub_path
settings.pathMinLength: Sub_path must be at least 4 characters
settings.pathMaxLength: Sub_path must be at most 64 characters
settings.pathInvalidChars: Sub_path may contain only lowercase letters, digits, and dashes
